title: Qoribu Truce
content:

{{Quote|The Kind seek only to live in harmony with the Song of the Universe.|[[Raynar Thul|UnuThul]] to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]|<ref name="Dark Nest I: The Joiner King">''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]''</ref>}}
{{Quote|Of course. A border guarantee and a promise of nonaggression. All Chiss doctrine, anyway.|[[Aristocra/Legends|Aristocra]] [[Chaf'orm'bintrano]] to the Skywalker couple|<ref name="Dark Nest I: The Joiner King" />}}
Forged by the [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] [[The Colony|Colony]] and the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Ascendancy]] at [[Qoribu]] in [[35 ABY/Legends|35 ABY]], the '''Qoribu Truce''' outlined the withdrawal of the [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] [[The Colony|Colony]] from [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] space. In exchange for a peaceful withdrawal, the Killiks were granted colonization rights to the [[Utegetu Nebula/Legends|Utegetu Nebula]] worlds. The Chiss Ascendancy would provide the Colony a border guarantee and a promise of non-aggression. The treaty was mediated by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]].

In [[36 ABY]], the Chiss declared the Truce broken as the Colony, under the influence of [[Lomi Plo]] and her [[Gorog|Dark Nest]], moved into Chiss border again. As a result the [[Swarm War]] broke out.
